rationale: NOR is defined by the equivalence phi NOR psi == not(phi or psi), so def:logical-equivalence (the ==) is the load-bearing semantic relation and was missing. Added, exactly as for NAND (0054).
notes: def:truth-assignment kept but flagged as the transitive dep beneath def:logical-equivalence -- same situation as 0054. Reviewer may replace rather than keep both.
